The focus includes technology services, financial exports, and business support, reflecting a broader trend toward service‑driven trade growth.

title: 刚刚，DeepSeek大升级，V4真的不远了｜附体验细节
content: DeepSeek’s web client has quietly added “Fast” and “Expert” modes, indicated by lightning and diamond icons. Fast mode, likely a lightweight V4 Lite, is quick, supports images and files, but less accurate on complex reasoning. Expert mode routes to a larger V4 model, offering higher accuracy on physics and logic tasks, though it currently lacks file and multimodal support. A future Vision mode may add true multimodal capability. The split signals a shift toward product stratification, balancing free access with potential future paid or quota‑based tiers.

content: Iran’s National Security Council announced acceptance of Pakistan’s cease‑fire proposal, claiming most war objectives were achieved and the enemy faced a historical defeat. It said it will continue fighting until its victories are consolidated, and will negotiate in Islamabad within 15 days. Iran rejected the opponent’s offer and presented a ten‑point plan via Pakistan to the U.S. The plan demands coordinated Hala (sic) – likely Hala? Actually Whar? Sorry. It calls for control of the Strait of Hormuz, end of war against the “Resistance Axis”, withdrawal of U.S. forces, security agreements, full compensation, lifting sanctions, release of frozen assets, all sanctioned by a binding UN resolution.

title: OpenAI 首席科学家 Ilya 偷拍 70 页文件指控 CEO 奥尔特曼习惯撒谎
content: An 18‑month investigation by The New York Times revealed that OpenAI’s chief scientist, Ilya Sutskever, and Anthropic co‑founder Dario Amodei released internal notes alleging that CEO Sam Altman habitually lies. Altman was briefly fired in November 2023 for “inadequate honesty” but reinstated five days later, an incident called “The Blip.” The report, never released, raises doubts about board governance, the collapse of OpenAI’s safety culture, Altman’s opaque equity dealings and his risky geopolitical alliances, especially with Middle East regimes.

content: The Wahaha family’s inheritance dispute shows signs of easing.  During the Qingming holiday, family members including Zong Fuli, her brother-in‑law, and the former president of Wahaha met at their ancestors’ tomb, signaling reconciliation.  In late March, Zong Fuli reached a compromise with Shanghai Cultural Tourism, agreeing to an additional payment of more than 2 billion RMB for a joint project.  Du Jian‑ying also participated in negotiating the sale of shares and agreed to cover over 300 million RMB of the purchase.

title: 全球内存芯片短缺，苹果 Mac mini / Studio 发货严重延迟
content: Apple’s Mac mini and Mac Studio models requiring large memory have significant back‑order delays due to a global shortage of memory chips, driven largely by soaring demand from AI server builds. In the U.S. and China, high‑memory configurations can take up to 4–5 months to ship, with 64 GB M4 Pro Mac mini orders arriving in about 16–18 weeks. Even base models face roughly a one‑month delay, and the 256 GB M3 Ultra Mac Studio also awaits 4–5 months. Prices remain high, and near‑term improvements are unlikely.
eventKey: 全球内存芯片短缺-mac-mini-studio-发货严重延迟

title: 被称为「GPT-4o 之母」的 OpenAI 高管宣布离职
content: OpenAI executive Joanne Jang, known as the “mother of GPT‑4o,” announced her departure after 4½ years, without explaining the reason or her next move. She led the team that gave ChatGPT its core capabilities. Her exit adds to recent executive turnover, which has included multiple departures and disagreements between CEO and CFO over the IPO timeline. With OpenAI valued at $852 billion and preparing to go public, the instability in top management has raised broad concerns about the IPO process.

content: Xpeng Auto terminated TrueEV's exclusive dealership status in Australia after two years of partnership problems. TrueEV faced a cash flow collapse, was taken over by its financing partner, failed to purchase vehicles for over a year, did not fulfill orders, and clashed with local dealers. Xpeng formally notified TrueEV of breach of contract and revoked its exclusive representation, though the company remains an authorized dealer.

title: 携程集团将启动「无理由事假」管理实验
content: Ctrip Group will pilot a “no-reason personal leave” experiment starting May 1, 2026, in selected business units. Approximately 6,000 employees will be randomly assigned to either an experimental or control group. Those in the experimental group can take up to 45 additional paid days per year without needing to provide a reason, in addition to regular paid leave. The policy’s future adoption will depend on the results after one year.

title: 这种颜色，全世界只有五个人见过 | 原文
content: L. Frank Baum’s 1900 novel *The Wizard of Oz* features the Emerald City, shrouded in green light. To “protect” visitors, guardians force them to wear green-tinted glasses, making everything appear emerald. In 1925, a different institution—University of California, Berkeley—built a device named Oz, which covertly reverses this effect, allowing observers to see through the green filter. The article contrasts Baum’s fictional optical illusion with Berkeley’s real-world technological reversal.
eventKey: 这种颜色-全世界只有五个人见过
normalizedTitle: 这种颜色 全世界只有五个人见过 原文

title: 芒格揭示长寿的关键：体力消耗不大、遵循规律规则、时间由自己主导。而这三点恰恰是价值投资者的日常状态
content: Charlie Munger and Warren Buffett illustrate how value investing promotes longevity: low physical strain, adherence to clear rules, and self‑directed time management. Their peers—famous value investors—reached high ages, while journalists and gamblers tend to die earlier due to stress, smoking, and overtrading. Value investing favors long‑term ownership over speculation, reducing anxiety and physical wear, which aligns with healthier, more fulfilling lifestyles that support longer life.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: Bitcoin and Quantum Computing
content: The discussion examines the potential impact of quantum computing on Bitcoin’s security. It explains how quantum algorithms could break the elliptic‑curve cryptography that secures Bitcoin addresses, potentially allowing attackers to forge signatures. The conversation explores current quantum resistance, possible migration to more secure algorithms, and the timeline for quantum attacks. It also considers the broader implications for blockchain technology and the need for proactive cryptographic upgrades.

It plans to enrich the AI with RAG‑driven documents and to build a personalized memory system for health and exercise similar to agent memory. Initial demos show poor recognition accuracy and constant, irrelevant audio prompts. The student seeks advice on improving detection or audio, and whether the project is too complex for a small team, asking for alternative ideas.

title: 被封了三个 claude pro 账号的一些经验
content: Three Claude Pro accounts were banned. All used the same US proxy, same device, and the same Bitget U credit card. The card’s BIN was flagged by Anthropic, triggering the bans. The first ban was after accessing Claude from Hong Kong, the second after a month of use, and the third after adding the card for points. Reusing devices and the Bitget U card caused simultaneous account revocation and refunds in each case.
eventKey: 被封了三个-claude-pro-账号的一些经验

title: 【Ease UI】2026-04-08 组件更新：新增组件 xly-dept-tree 部门树组件与优化
content: Ease UI released a new Vue 3 component library update on 2026‑04‑08, adding a department‑tree component (xly‑dept‑tree) that builds tree structures from flat or nested data, supports custom key mapping, controlled expansion, selection, and emits events. It also improves xly‑table with fixed action columns, default width, and advanced column‑width handling. Bug fixes address selection key issues. The library remains lightweight, requires only Element Plus, and offers copy‑paste‑ready Vue single‑file components.

title: claude code 怎么开启流式传输？
content: You are using a VPS with CLIProxyApi to proxy Claude and Codex. The terminal version of Claude’s CLI does not support streaming output; it prints the entire result at once. While OpenCode enables streaming, Claude Code CLI inherently lacks this feature. The issue is not with your nginx or Cloudflare setup but with the CLI itself, which currently cannot stream responses.

title: Vibe Coding 实战例子
content: Recent research into Claude Code shows impressive problem‑solving, even replicating simple website templates like the ai‑website‑cloner. However, full‑process projects often face issues requiring research, leading to hype around agents, skills, and MCP without practical guidance. Few resources cover step‑by‑step AI‑assisted development, from initial setup to debugging and quality assurance. The closest example today is a short YouTube video that previews the process, with a likely eventual paid course.
eventKey: vibe-coding-实战例子
normalizedTitle: vibe coding 实战例子

title: 开源一个给 LLM Agent 用的长期记忆框架： LycheeMem
content: LycheeMem is an open‑source long‑term memory framework for LLM agents, aiming to improve persistence across multi‑turn, multi‑task, and multi‑session scenarios while keeping deployment easy. It supports LangGraph, HTTP MCP, and OpenClaw, and offers compact semantic memory with SQLite + LanceDB, HTTP MCP, and native OpenClaw plugins. The package can be installed with `pip install lycheemem`. Early tests on PinchBench and OpenClaw show about 6 % performance gain and reductions of ~71 % in tokens and ~55 % in cost. The project is available on GitHub.
eventKey: 开源一个给-llm-agent-用的长期记忆框架-lycheemem
normalizedTitle: 开源一个给 llm agent 用的长期记忆框架 lycheemem

title: 到底是我在上班，还是 OpenClaw 在上班？
content: I use three AI agents to automate my work: OpenClaw handles day‑to‑day tasks; Claude Code manages OpenClaw’s configuration, restarting and repairing it when needed; and YoooClaw runs on my phone, reading unread notifications and forwarding them to OpenClaw. I control Claude Code remotely via Happy on my phone, allowing me to add plugins or change settings on the go. This closed loop lets OpenClaw fill timesheets, answer questions, and complete tasks without my direct input.
eventKey: 到底是我在上班-openclaw-在上班
normalizedTitle: 到底是我在上班 还是 openclaw 在上班

title: 🔥 Spring-AI 与 Solon-AI 深度对比分析报告
content:
一、框架概述 1.1 共同点概述

Spring AI 与 Solon AI 都是面向 Java 开发者的 AI 应用开发框架，旨在简化大语言模型（LLM）在企业级应用中的集成与开发。尽管两者在设计理念、生态定位和实现细节上有所不同，但它们在核心目标和能力上具有显著的共性：

统一模型接口：两者都提供了统一的 LLM 调用接口，屏蔽底层不同模型供应商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、Ollama 等）的 API 差异，实现"一份代码，跨模型运行"
完整的 RAG 链路：均支持从文档加载、切分、向量化、存储到检索重排的完整 RAG 流程…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 梅子酒好吃
eventKey: spring-ai-solon-ai-深度对比分析报告
normalizedTitle: 🔥 spring-ai 与 solon-ai 深度对比分析报告
representativeSources: 开源中国-全部 - 梅子酒好吃

title: 2026Q1白酒业绩预测-招商
content:
总结下招商对25Q4/26Q1白酒业绩前瞻研报 一、 核心观点：行业延续出清，筑底进行时

总体趋势：26Q1，多数白酒企业的财务报表预计将延续自25年第三、四季度以来的“出清”趋势（即主动消化渠道库存、释放业绩压力），但同比下滑的幅度相比之前会有所收窄。行业状态：

政策转变：多数酒企不再强制要求“开门红”，减轻了渠道压力。

库存与价格：渠道库存压力持续释放，产品价格调整已接近底部。

企业分化：前期率先进行深度调整的企业（如迎驾贡酒、舍得酒业）当前状态相对轻松。

未来展望：2026年将是行业的“筑底期”。后续需要重点关注酒企库存去化、渠道利润修复的进展…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 价投小白鸽
eventKey: 2026q1白酒业绩预测-招商
normalizedTitle: 2026q1白酒业绩预测-招商
representativeSources: 热帖 - 雪球 - 价投小白鸽

title: 字节跳动开源 Scale-SWE 数据集
content:
中国人民大学高瓴人工智能学院与字节跳动技术团队合作近日完成相关研究，发布 Scale-SWE 数据集。研究团队依托火山引擎的 Sandbox 基建，通过 Sandboxed multi-agent 系统，成功实现 SWE 任务的规模化拓展，构建起包含 100k 真实数据、目前规模最大的开源高质量 SWE 数据集。 基于该数据集蒸馏数据所训练的 Qwen3-30A3B-Instruct 模型，也在 SWE-bench-Verified 评测中取得了 64% 的优异成绩。

根据介绍，研究团队提出了一套在 Sandbox 环境中运行的多 Agent…

title: Balaji on Why AI Raises the Cost of Verification
content: Erik Torenberg interviews Balaji Srinivasan on how AI cuts creation costs but raises verification costs. They explore why AI pushes firms toward a “trusted tribe” model like China’s internet, why physical tasks are easier to automate than digital ones, why shortcuts work mainly for experts, and why AI turns everyone into a CEO rather than eliminating CEOs. The discussion highlights the tension shaping the AI economy.

title: [注册送 5 刀] [含抽奖] 招募小白鼠， Mirrorstages 支持 CC Max 啦，测试期间最低 0.3 元/刀
content: Mirrorstages is an AI model proxy service that has operated for three months, offering GPT and Claude models via stable channels. Prices are 0.5¥ per $1 for GPT (Pro/Plus) and 0.6¥ per $1 for Claude (Bedrock/azure). New users receive 5 “刀” (tokens) and a 2× bonus on first top‑up, enabling a test‑period rate of 0.3¥ per $1. The platform claims 90% success rate, supports enterprise contracts and various invoices, and holds a random lottery for 10 users to win 10刀, with 5刀 added for new registrations.

title: Stellarium v​​26.1 发布
content:
Stellarium 26.1 已发布。Stellarium 是一款免费开源 GPL（自由软件基金会 GNU 通用公共许可证）软件，它使用 OpenGL 图形接口对星空进行实时渲染。软件可以模拟肉眼、双筒望远镜和小型天文等观察天空，根据观测者所处时间和位置，计算出天空中太阳、月球、行星等天体位置，并将其精确地显示出来。还可以绘制星座、演示天文现象，如流星雨、日食和月食等。 Stellarium 还被应用于天文馆中作为教学展示软件，作为天文爱好者星空望远镜观测辅助软件。

此版本的主要变化内容如下：

新增两种 sky cultures
添加了…

title: 王文捕获的“十倍牛股”：低估值、高现金流、高分红、业务长期可持续、有梦想
content: Wang Wen, a long‑time value investor, built wealth through low‑valuation, high cash‑flow, high‑dividend stocks (the “two highs, one low” rule). His early successes included Sichuan Changhong, Guangdong Power B, Itai B (100× gain), State General Power and Guizhou Moutai (10×). In 2019 he founded Ridu Investment, focusing on fundamental research and cycle‑based selection. He currently targets undervalued financials, AI‑ready internet giants, energy, and healthcare, while emphasizing long‑term perspective and disciplined risk management.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: 免费的 VibeIsland - AgentIsland
content: AgentIsland is a macOS menu‑bar application inspired by ClaudeIsland. It consolidates tasks related to running Claude, Codex, and Gemini agents—such as permission requests, session visibility, tool timelines, session history, and handling multiple agents—into a single accessible interface. The open‑source project reduces the need to switch windows while managing agents. Users are encouraged to try it, report issues, and contribute upgrades. Source code is available at the AgentIsland repository.

normalizedTitle: 免费的 vibeisland - agentisland

title: IDEA 用什么 Ai 好

title: 好奇问问， AI 时代大家砸钱最多的一笔支出是什么？
content: In the AI era, the author’s largest expense was a DJI Mini microphone (€500). Though a simple recorder, it boosts productivity by enabling near‑instant, highly accurate voice typing in WeChat, eliminating typing altogether. The lapel mic captures whisper‑level speech with minimal interference from distance or noise, improving workflow especially during coding problems by letting the user “talk through” thoughts rather than type. The author invites others to share their biggest AI-related expenses.

title: 我把血检报告喂给AI，这算不算过度分享？
content: Feeding a blood test report to an AI chatbot can provide answers, but it carries risks. Sharing detailed medical records with a language model may expose sensitive health information to uncertainty about data handling, privacy, and accuracy of interpretations. Users should carefully weigh the benefits against potential privacy breaches and inaccuracies before disclosing personal medical data to AI.

title: 《纽约客》长篇特稿丨OpenAI奥特曼或许掌控我们的未来——他值得信任吗？(2) | 原文
content: The New Yorker profile examines Sam Altman’s early engagement with Saudi Arabia, starting with a 2016 dinner where he met Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman and later joined the “NEOM” advisory board. It traces Altman’s consideration of substantial funding from the Saudi Public Investment Fund and his discussions with colleagues who cautioned against the move. The piece explores how these ties raise questions about Altman’s trustworthiness and his influence on the future of technology and geopolitics.
